title: May 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 11''' is the 131st day of the year (132nd in leap years). There are 234 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Terence McGovern]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Nicky Katt]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Athena Yvette Portillo]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Stephen Scaia]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[The Jedi Nexus]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 99|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 99]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Doomsday Ship]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Anakin to the Rescue]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – Three [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']] [[Gallery of TV Guide covers|''TV Guide'' covers]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 23]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Glen Orbik]] dies.
*[[2016]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 20|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 20]] published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 18|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 18]] published in Germany.
*2016 – ''[[The Star Wars Show]]'' premieres on YouTube.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Entertainment Weekly's The Ultimate Guide to Han Solo]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: I Am a Clone Trooper]]'' published.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Lightsabers|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Lightsabers]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Halcyon Legacy 3|''Halcyon Legacy'' 3]] published.
<noinclude>
